title: Outlook Email integration for Sub-Item
excerpt: Would love to request a new feature that allows for sub-items to integrate with Outlook Email. We have created an Applicant Tracking System and would like to send emails based on a status to candidates to let them know n…

posts.author: amy.douglas (Amy Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would love to request a new feature that allows for sub-items to integrate with Outlook Email. We have created an Applicant Tracking System and would like to send emails based on a status to candidates to let them know next steps.

Thank you,

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @amy.douglas!

Just to be sure we are on the same page here, what you trying to build is a flow in which when a subitem’s status changes, an email is sent via Outlook? Do you want to do this using the Outlook integration or are you open to using some other solution that might involve coding (or some no-code platform like Zapier or Make)?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: amy.douglas (Amy Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using the Outlook integration I would like to send an email from a change in the sub-item status.

Thank you,
LEVATA Human Performance.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @amy.douglas!

I will share this with our team so that it can be reviewed

Thank you for the feedback!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: laujenni (Lau Jen Ni )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Matias.Monday , just wondering is this feature currently available yet? If not, when will this feature expected to be launch? likewise for gmail. thank you.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Moving this since it is not really from the apps and API domain but a question about a native integration.

posts.author: emilyannlaliotis (Emily Laliotis)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m also wondering when there will be the option to automate an email when a subitem status changes. I’d prefer it to work with Gmail, but am open to a tool like zapier.

posts.author: avp (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, checking in on this as we very much need this feature as well. There are multiple threads asking for the same.

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is possible using zzBots to send an email from your Gmail/Outlook when the subitem status is set to a certain value.

If you are interested in getting this set up, just chat with us on our website.
